title: みんなの人気者の後に・後援会！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Haru Urara hears that her shopkeeper
friends have created a fan club for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she doesn't really know what that means,
she's overjoyed to hear so many people are
cheering her on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also believe that the more fans she gets, the
more it drives Haru Urara forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I resolve to continue entering her in more races to
increase her number of fans.
